title: Bundle Multipack 400g Munch & Crunch Tasty Beef Paddywack - Dehydrated Dog Food Snack Treat Chews for Dogs - 100% Natural Meaty Bites - 5 Item pack with a Kerhoot Guide To Happy & Healthy Dogs Booklet
features: BUNDLE MULTIPACK - 100% Natural Dog Treats - High Protein Tasty Beef Paddywack Dog Chews Are Low In Fat Healthy And Dogs Love Them - You Will Receive Five Items In Total
400 GRAMS DRIED DOG FOOD - These Delicious Chewy Dried Beef Chews Are Low In Fat & Grease And Do Not Make A Mess On Your Carpets
DENTAL CARE FOR DOGS - Aids With Dental Hygiene - Helps To Keep Teeth Clean Healthy & Strong - Fight Plaque And Tartar
DOG SNACKS - Give As A Treat Or Reward Quality Natural Air Dried Treats For Dogs Of All Ages And Sizes.

PLUS A Kerhoot 8 Page Booklet Packed With Great Information About Everyday Dog Care. This Glossy Booklet Has Both Pictures and Text Offering Lots Of Great Advice About Feeding And General Day To Day Dog Care Information. You Can Keep It And Refer Back To It Whenever You May Need It.
description: Product description DRIED FOOD FOR DOGS This is a 5 item bundle - Dried Paddywack is a chewy piece of pure beef that has been slowly air dried in drying ovens to crisp the Paddywack to a golden colour. HEALTHY TREATS FOR DOGS Paddywack is super high in protein and is a great treat or reward for your dog! Always supervise your dogs when feeding these treats, and provide fresh drinking water for your dog. MULTIPACK Pack includes FOUR 100g packs of Munch & Crunch Paddywack so you get 400g in total packed in four resealable bags for long term freshness. ALSO INCLUDED One Kerhoot dog care booklet free. Ingredients BEEF Directions Always Supply Fresh Water and supervise your pet while eating See more
